summary_en: Upper limit ¥4.5B, 4,000,000 shares (6.2% of shares outstanding), open-market purchase on TSE, Jun 1 2026–Mar 31 2027. Reason: flexible capital management and enhanced shareholder returns.
title_en: Notice of Determination of Matters Relating to Acquisition of Treasury Stock (Treasury Stock Acquisition Under Article 459(1) of the Companies Act)
translation_en_brief: TPR Co., Ltd. announced on May 15, 2026 that its board of directors resolved to acquire treasury stock under Article 459(1) of the Companies Act. The company will purchase up to 4,000,000 shares of common stock, representing approximately 6.2% of shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock), with an aggregate upper limit of ¥4.5 billion. Purchases will occur via open-market transactions on the Tokyo Stock Exchange from June 1, 2026 through March 31, 2027. The stated purpose is to execute flexible capital management, expand shareholder returns, and improve capital efficiency. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 2,095,171 treasury shares against 64,447,827 issued shares outstanding.
